title: Return Problem JSON Errors with Echo
summary: Return application/problem+json errors from Echo with one small error handler and one reusable writer helper.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers Echo HTTPError formatting, generic 500 errors, fallback detail text for non-string HTTPError messages, preserving already committed responses, default type and title filling, and nil context rejection in the writer helper.
